# xui Provider

Manage [3x-ui](https://github.com/MHSanaei/3x-ui/) v3+ panel resources — inbounds, clients, Xray template, and panel settings.

Authenticate with a panel **API token** (Bearer, for `/panel/api/*`) or **username/password** (session + CSRF). Panel settings and Xray template endpoints require username and password even when `api_token` is set.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "xui" {
  base_url             = "https://panel.example.com/your-random-path/"
  username             = var.xui_username
  password             = var.xui_password
  insecure_skip_verify = false
}

# Or API-token auth for /panel/api/* only:
# provider "xui" {
#   base_url  = "https://panel.example.com/your-random-path/"
#   api_token = var.xui_api_token
# }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `base_url` (String) Panel root URL including random path prefix, e.g. `https://host:port/<uuid>/`.

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) Panel API token (Bearer). Skips login/CSRF for `/panel/api/*`.
- `insecure_skip_verify` (Boolean) Skip TLS verification (e.g. self-signed panel certificate).
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Panel login password.
- `username` (String) Panel login username.
